intro: The saga of the Lake Prince reaches its grand finale. A masterpiece Action RPG that masterfully fuses immersive visuals with pulse-pounding action!
description:
Originally released by System Sacom in 1986, this title is an action RPG where players take on the role of a lake prince transformed into a hideous "Veil." Embark on a perilous journey to track down the sorcerer responsible for the curse.

True to its predecessor, the game progresses through alternating visual story segments and action stages. Its unique charm lies in the masterful fusion of an immersive narrative—told through CG and text—with the fluid gameplay of 4-way scrolling and shooting. Compared to the first entry, this sequel features significant enhancements to the action, including faster character movement, more powerful enemy attacks, a variety of massive bosses, and expanded map sizes. Players can look forward to a more challenging and rewarding action RPG experience.
 
 *This application does not have a scene select mode.
 *The main game and gallery screen (*Gallery) are in Japanese version.
 *Other menu screens and "How to play" screens are in English.
 *Flashing lights or patterns may cause dizziness, spasms, or loss of consciousness. If you feel unwell, stop playing immediately and see a doctor.
   If you have a history of these symptoms, consult a physician before use.
